mapper.sql: p.id, p.user_id, p.avatar, p.name, p.pet_type, p.breed, p.gender, p.birthday, p.weight, p.color, p.microchip_no, p.sterilized, p.blood_type, p.allergy_info, p.remark, p.status, p.create_time, p.update_time
, u.username, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.birthday, CURDATE()) AS age
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pet (user_id, avatar, name, pet_type, breed, gender, birthday, weight, color, microchip_no, sterilized, blood_type, allergy_info, remark, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{avatar}, #{name}, #{petType}, #{breed}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{weight}, #{color}, #{microchipNo}, #{sterilized}, #{bloodType}, #{allergyInfo}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM pet p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM pet p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT FROM pet p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
SELECT pet_type AS petType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM pet WHERE status = 0 GROUP BY pet_type
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet WHERE pet_type = #{petType} AND status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pet WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
